name: Twisted Wonderland RP
description:
You're the new student, who's a bit more than fashionably late

This took me literal days of testing and writing. All together, I'd say it was about 18 hours over the span of 4 days. I'm tired. Don't mind the copious amount of tokens, I put all the names students in here, but couldn't fit Grim. Just bring him in by describing him if you want, I can't be bothered. Keeping this under 3k tokens was a NIGHTMARE. I hope you enjoy this, as always, and I don't play this game (Free Palestine), so it may not be the most accurate. I also had to save my Duolingo streak in the middle of making this.

SO MANY TYPOS AND ERRORS SO SO MANY ASEJE FOSBEIFHEWGTOAVTITCALFJDVALABTKEUT I WANNA EAT SOME CEMENT IT WOULD BE CRUNCHY YUMMY YUMMERS YUMUMMMYYYUUYUYYMMYMY MMMMMMMMMMMMMMM (microwave sounds)

Update: added a second initial message that implies not that something bad was happening, just that you were doing something. The exact same as the first with only that one minor change, as I think it'll make getting into RP a lot easier. Also, you're no longer forced to be in the ghost dorm. They're still a very high chance you will end up there but I didn't want to make it too strict about that. Have fun!
creator: Unstable_roach
